name: The Tower Of TigerQiuQiu 2
short_description: About: The Tower of TigerQiuQiu is a mini game collection Include：Gem Three Elimin，1942-J20，Under Water Bubble ，Ball Breaker，Tiger Tank 70
detailed_description:
About:
The Tower of TigerQiuQiu is a mini game collection

Include：
Gem Three Elimin：Beautiful gem elimination game

1942-J20：What if a J20 fighter jet crossed into the 1942 air and sea war?

Under Water Bubble: What if a J20 fighter jet crossed into the 1942 air and sea war?

Ball Breaker: Beautiful ball-playing brick game

Tiger Tank 70：Not only the evolution of the picture, but also the perfect solution to the road-finding problem of the new generation of tiger tank battle
